name: La Roche-Posay Fanzone
description: Shooting/aiming game — score goals, track shots and streaks. Dual mode: mobile and kiosk/stand.

boot.note: La Roche-Posay uses a single Manager GameObject — SetData + LoadScene in one call. No separate preload/load/start steps.

notes: Boot is simplified — one SendMessage to Manager.LoadScene with {environment, muted}.
No scene preloading or addressable steps. Does NOT use the standard WebService/GameService pattern.
Has dual display mode: mobile (/mobile/*) and stand/kiosk (/stand/*) — separate route groups.
sendEvent is a generic catch-all event — check Unity .jslib for what it emits.
NEXT_PUBLIC_UNITY_VERSION is hardcoded — no version.json auto-resolution in this project.
